message:
chore: add ephemeral patterns to .gitignore

Add patterns for files that repeatedly show up as untracked from
multi-agent development activity:

- .target-*/ (dot-prefixed agent worktree targets)
- .agent-mail-project-id (agent mail runtime state)
- *.mcp.json, opencode.json (editor/agent MCP configs)
- fix_*.py, refactor_*.py, update_*.py (agent one-off scripts)
- tests/e2e/artifacts/ (E2E test runtime output)
- ubs*.txt (UBS scanner reports)
- **/*_bug_test.rs, **/*_test_bug.rs (agent bug reproduction files)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -132,8 +132,31 @@ storage.sqlite3.bak
 .write_probe
 **/test_bug.rs
 **/test_deadlock.rs
+**/*_bug_test.rs
+**/*_test_bug.rs
 /frankenredis/
 
+# Agent worktree target directories (dot-prefixed)
+.target-*/
+
+# Agent mail project ID (runtime state)
+.agent-mail-project-id
+
+# MCP config files (editor/agent-specific, contain local paths/tokens)
+*.mcp.json
+opencode.json
+
+# Agent-generated Python scripts (one-off fix/refactor/update tools)
+fix_*.py
+refactor_*.py
+update_*.py
+
+# E2E test artifacts (runtime output)
+tests/e2e/artifacts/
+
+# UBS (Ultimate Bug Scanner) reports
+ubs*.txt
+
 # Agent tool MCP config backups (timestamped .bak files)
 .claude/*.bak
 .cline.mcp.json.*
